findings.finding: 'Suppress from enumeration entirely' silently hides a legitimate early-phase lifecycle in the standalone/manual critical-review path: prepare-dispatch <path> --feature <slug> against an operator-created dir before lifecycle_start passes the Phase-1 write-guard (dir exists) and may write only synthesizer_drift/sentinel_absence, making a real dir's event-set a subset of the allow-set, so SessionStart suppresses a dir the operator would want surfaced. Weigh 'classify as non-lifecycle but still report' vs silent suppression.
findings.evidence_quote: SessionStart lifecycle enumeration no longer surfaces artifact-less, telemetry-only dirs as "research"-phase lifecycles.
